overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character carrying a large backpack traversing a scenic river valley. The character walks along sandy riverbanks and climbs red rock formations in a natural wilderness environment with mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: river valley floor with sandy soil and scattered shrubs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the river while carrying a large cargo backpack

entered.detail: large red sandstone cliff formation rising on the right side of the valley
calm river flowing through the valley with reflections on the surface
mixed sandy and dirt ground with sparse grass patches
hazy mountains visible in the background beyond the river
small green shrubs scattered across the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy river valley floor with sparse vegetation. A large red rock cliff rises on the right while the river flows calmly on the left, with distant mountains visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: river shoreline with pebble beach and shallow water access

events.description: ground surface transitions from sandy dirt to pebble stones as character reaches the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the pebble shoreline at the river's edge, moving closer to the water

entered.detail: beach area covered in smooth rounded stones and pebbles
clear shallow water at the river's edge with visible stones beneath
patches of taller green grass growing along the bank

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a pebble beach at the river's edge, with the red rock cliff now looming close on the right. The ground is covered in smooth stones and patches of tall grass as the character walks along the waterline.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep red rock cliff face with handholds and ledges

events.description: character begins ascending the red rock cliff face, transitioning from walking to climbing
climbing higher up the rock formation with the river now visible far below

agents.ego_description: climbing up the red sandstone cliff face using hands and feet while maneuvering the large backpack

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations at the base of the cliff
vertical sandstone cliff face with visible layers and handholds
steep drop-off at the edge of the rock formation
rocks visible beneath the water's surface near the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character begins climbing the red rock cliff face, using handholds and ledges to ascend. The river is now visible far below as the character gains elevation, with the rock surface filling most of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cliff top overlooking the river valley

events.description: reaches the top of the cliff and transitions from climbing back to walking on flat rock surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the top of the cliff edge overlooking the river valley below

entered.detail: flat rocky plateau at the top of the cliff formation
panoramic view of the river and valley from the elevated cliff position
small trees and shrubs growing on the cliff top

segments.scene_description: Having reached the summit, the character walks along the flat cliff top with the river valley spread out below. The perspective shifts to an overlook view of the water and distant shore, with scattered vegetation on the rocky plateau.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying river valley floor to the panoramic summit of a towering red rock cliff. It begins with the character walking through a sandy valley beside a calm river, with distant mountains visible through a light haze. As the character moves toward the water's edge, the terrain shifts into a pebble beach of smooth stones and tall grass while the red cliff looms closer on the right. The scene then shifts upward as the character begins climbing the rock face, with the river receding far below as the textured stone surface fills the frame. Finally, the camera reaches the summit, opening up to a wide overlook of the rocky plateau and the expansive river valley spread out beneath a clear horizon.
